worker_profile.launch_summary: pi implementer: provider=openai-codex model=gpt-5.6-sol reasoning=xhigh mode=fast

completed_slices.summary: Expanded EX-0004 into a polished, original garden-pond experience with inline SVG/CSS scenery, frog art, responsive layouts, preserved square-grid mechanics, and updated design/validation documentation.
tests_run: npm --prefix experiments run check — passed; 0 Svelte errors/warnings and catalog valid
SMOKE_EXERCISES=EX-0004 npm --prefix experiments run test:smoke — 6/6 passed
Headless Chrome inspection at 1440px and 320px — no console errors or horizontal overflow; rendered cells remained square and the mobile frog target measured 44.1px

acceptance_status.criterion: The playfield reads as a coherent East Asian garden-inspired pond board using original SVG/CSS art rather than copied branded characters or layouts.
acceptance_status.evidence: Prototype.svelte now contains hand-authored pond, pavilion, bridge, lantern, lotus, shoreline, frog, and completion artwork using only inline SVG/CSS. No asset, dependency, or network request was added.

acceptance_status.criterion: Every visible movement cell remains a true square and every ordinary horizontal or vertical jump remains exactly one cell side; the obstacle jump remains two unit lengths in one action.
acceptance_status.evidence: Mechanic functions are unchanged: vectors remain exactly 10 SVG units orthogonally and the obstacle step remains distance 2. Both maps retain 120×100 viewBoxes, 10×10 patterns, and 6:5 rendering. Browser measurements showed equal cell width and height at desktop and 320px.

acceptance_status.criterion: Tutorial, horizontal prediction, vertical transfer, and obstacle rounds retain their existing interaction semantics and deterministic smoke hooks.
acceptance_status.evidence: All data-smoke state, action, control, feedback, and prediction hooks remain present. The EX-0004 smoke suite traversed all rounds, including recoverable error and retry, with 6/6 tests passing.

acceptance_status.criterion: The UI remains readable and operable by keyboard, touch at 320px, and reduced-motion users without horizontal overflow.
acceptance_status.evidence: Smoke tests passed reduced-motion keyboard and 320px touch routes. Headless Chrome reported viewport and document widths of 320px, no console/page errors, square 24.5px mobile cells, and a 44.1×44.1px tutorial touch target.

acceptance_status.criterion: EX-0004 DESIGN.md records the visual rationale, preserved mechanic invariants, and validation evidence without claiming MES-02 contract approval or pupil efficacy.
acceptance_status.evidence: DESIGN.md now records the pond-board rationale, originality boundary, render and interaction invariants, command/browser validation evidence, and explicit exclusions for MES-02 approval, accessibility equivalence, and pupil efficacy.

assumptions: The authoritative slice provided the garden-inspired direction but no reference asset paths; the implementation therefore uses an original composition rather than reproducing any reference layout.
Browser checks establish implementation operability and geometry only, not pupil efficacy or practical accessibility equivalence.
